post.content: What are rightmost nodes here? Right most nodes at every level or starting from root keep traversing right till no node?
Brother which location and for which role?

It looks like we just have to count the sum of the path from root to each leaf node as that corresponds to a unique combination. To do so, we can do a simple dfs and pass the ancestor sum to each node of the tree till the root node where we push the answer to a global result vector. I guess that should suffice.

get sum of right most node of all combination => we need to evaluate sum of all parent to leaf node path  & repeat it with number of possible permutation of other remaining nodes.\nnumber of possible permutation of other remaining nodes => calculate nodes that have 2 children ( lead to 2 permutation ) & check if the current leaf node is part of 2 child parent - if so then reduce the 2 possible combination count by 1. So if there are finally n nodes with 2 child -> we need to repeat the parent to child path sum 2^n times.\n
